name: io.github.mobileproxy/mcp-server
description: Model Context Protocol server for mobileproxy.space — give Claude/Cursor/Windsurf direct control over your mobile proxies. Tools: list_proxies, get_proxy_status, get_balance, get_geo_list, get_price, rotate_ip, change_geo, buy_proxy.

environmentVariables.name: MOBILEPROXY_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override REST API base URL (default https://mobileproxy.space)

environmentVariables.name: MOBILEPROXY_DEBUG
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 for verbose stderr logs
